name: Investment Report Generator
description: Daily (1 PM ET, Mon-Fri): Compiles top picks, active alerts, and market outlook into an HTML investment report.

parameters.content:
## Report Generator

Required: postgresApi
HTML report: top picks, alerts, outlook

parameters.query: SELECT ticker,strategy,overall_score,fundamental_score,technical_score,sentiment_score,recommendation,thesis FROM investment_scores WHERE score_date=CURRENT_DATE AND overall_score>=6.0 ORDER BY strategy,overall_score DESC
SELECT ticker,alert_type,strategy,message,severity FROM alerts WHERE triggered_at::date=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY severity DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT summary FROM ai_agent_reports WHERE agent_name='broad_market_analyst' AND report_date=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
